name: Encompass Recovery Group
description_short: Encompass Recovery Group is a credit repair provider based in Hollywood, Florida. Rated 4.9/5 with 1,088 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Encompass Recovery Group is a credit repair provider serving clients in Hollywood, Florida. With 1,088 Google reviews and a 4.9/5.0 rating, Encompass Recovery Group has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Encompass Recovery Group specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Hollywood, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Encompass Recovery Group operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Hollywood, Florida area who are considering Encompass Recovery Group should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
